## Building an Image Gallery with Lightbox in Vue 3 **Mental model:** A thumbnail grid plus an overlay showing one image. Drive the lightbox with a single nullable *index* (`null` = closed). Prev/next wrap with modulo; Escape and backdrop click close. ### Step 1 — Open index ```js const index = ref(null); const close = () => (index.value = null); ``` ### Step 2 — Prev / next with wrap ```js const prev = () => { index.value = (index.value - 1 + images.length) % images.length; }; const next = () => { index.value = (index.value + 1) % images.length; }; ``` ### Step 3 — Keyboard while open ```js watch(index, (v) => { if (v !== null) window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey); else window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey); }); ``` ### Step 4 — Overlay with `@click.self` ```vue
``` **Edge cases** | Case | Handling | | :-- | :-- | | Wrap at ends | Modulo. | | Backdrop vs image | `@click.self` on the backdrop. | | Cleanup | Remove keydown on close + unmount. | **Interview tip:** A single nullable index models the whole lightbox; `@click.self` gives backdrop-only close for free without manual `stopPropagation`.
